mapper.sql: p.id, p.code, p.name, p.type, p.description, p.sort_order, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.created_by, p.updated_by, p.remark, p.status, p.is_deleted, p.opt_lock_version
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT
FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN roles r ON rp.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 AND r.status = 1 AND p.is_deleted = 0 AND rp.is_deleted = 0 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND ur.is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.id ASC
